title: Rate Cuts and Their Implications for Crypto, Vol. 2
excerpt: With the Fed navigating a precarious balance between sticky inflation and slowing growth, rate cuts are back on the table. This piece examines how the evolving macro backdrop reshapes the case for crypto as a portfolio asset.

title: Hyperscalers或将让出基础云业务给 DePIN
excerpt: 中文原创研究：超大模雲服務商或將讓出基礎雲業務給 DePIN。深入分析 AI 時代下超大規模雲廠商戰略轉向，以及去中心化物理基礎設施網絡填補基礎雲計算空白的經濟邏輯。

title: Hyperscalers May Cede Basic Cloud Business to DePIN
excerpt: As hyperscalers retreat from commodity compute to focus on high-margin AI services, DePIN networks are emerging as the natural backfill for basic cloud infrastructure — and the economic logic is surprisingly compelling.

title: Duration of This Bubble Burst and Future Outlook
excerpt: A historical lens on crypto market cycles — comparing the current drawdown to prior deleveraging events and mapping the path to recovery using onchain and macro indicators.

title: The Rise of the Machine Economy: peaq ($PEAQ) in 2026
excerpt: A deep dive into the DePIN thesis through the lens of peaq — examining the convergence of robotics, tokenized infrastructure, and the economic incentives that could make machine-to-machine economies viable.

title: Bitcoin's Role in a Fractured Macro and Its Risks
excerpt: Bitcoin, gold, and the search for non-sovereign stores of value — analyzing BTC's behavior across rate cycles, geopolitical shocks, and the shifting global monetary order.

title: Rate Cuts and Their Implications for Crypto
excerpt: Analyzing how Federal Reserve rate policy filters through to crypto markets — examining liquidity channels, risk appetite, and historical precedent for digital assets in easing cycles.

title: Market Outlook Under the New US-CN Tariff Deal
excerpt: Breaking down the macro implications of the US-China tariff agreement — treasury yields, risk assets, and what it means for crypto markets navigating a shifting trade regime.

title: ETH's Recent Recovery Is Backed by Solid Foundation, Not Speculation
excerpt: Countering the narrative that Ethereum's bounce is purely speculative — examining L2 growth, staking metrics, and protocol revenue data that suggest structural demand underpinning the recovery.

title: Bitcoin Nears the Brink of Rapid Growth
excerpt: Analyzing the macro and onchain signals suggesting Bitcoin was approaching an inflection point — ETF flows, hash rate dynamics, and the case for structurally higher demand.
